headline: Dallas Fed President Logan calls for 'modestly' higher interest rates
detail: Higher interest rates generally hurt growth and tech stocks by making future earnings less valuable and increasing borrowing costs. This puts direct pressure on your concentrated tech/chip portfolio.
rec: Consider trimming positions like QQQ or QQQI to reduce overall tech exposure and free up margin, especially given the "TRIM" status.

headline: Short sellers load up against SpaceX as stock drops below IPO price
detail: While you don't hold SpaceX, this indicates increased bearish sentiment towards high-growth, speculative tech companies. This could reflect a broader cautious mood in the market for similar names.
rec: No direct action on your holdings, but be aware of the general sentiment for speculative growth stocks in your portfolio.
